response.justification: Bogdan is a technically accomplished individual contributor with genuine developer tooling exposure (CI/CD setup, test frameworks, MCP generators) and a commendable teaching culture, but the role is fundamentally a people-leadership position requiring demonstrated people management, and there is no evidence anywhere in the resume of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, hiring, or driving organizational change. Staff/Senior titles and founding an open-source project do not substitute for the 2+ years of direct people management the JD requires as a minimum.
strengths: Broad, hands-on developer tooling background: CI/CD infrastructure, bespoke test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and modern AI/MCP developer tooling at re:cinq
Strong teaching and mentoring culture evidenced by multiple workshops, recurring code katas/refactoring dojos, and a full Selenium course delivered externally
Wide technical breadth (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput systems) gives credibility when guiding engineers across a diverse platform ecosystem
concerns: Zero evidence of direct people management: no team size, no hiring, no performance conversations, no org chart ownership across 17 years of employment history
No organizational change leadership or strategic roadmap ownership at any meaningful scope; all roles are individual contributor or solo founder
No advanced degree (preferred Master's/PhD absent) and no explicit mobile-platform engineering productivity work, two gaps that together weaken the preferred-qualification alignment

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and CI/CD hands-on work
No organizational or change leadership evidence
